summary: Frontend-only Playwright testing of Felix v2 (Trade-Republic light theme). All requested flows verified at 1440x900 and 430x900. TopNav, Home heatmap (26 cells across 7 sectors), Investissements sidebar (5 holdings), movers (5), sector tiles (7), dropdowns (period + index), refresh button, StockDetail sections (metrics, dividends, analysts+analysts-bar, events, related), buy/sell trade card with amount->review-order enable, position card, create-plan, back, star toggle, Watchlist empty state + CTA, Portfolio with 5 holdings, Settings rows — all present and functional. Responsive fallback (mobile stacked sector rows) verified.

issues: Sector header text uses white on near-black at 11px which is readable, but small labels like BOAS/CBIBF/BOAN inside tight bank cells are truncated to just the ticker without % — acceptable given adaptive font sizing.

critical_code_review_comments: React Router v6 future flag warnings visible in console (v7_startTransition, v7_relativeSplatPath) — non-blocking but easy to silence by opting in.

relatedStocks(ticker, 4) returns only 1 card for SNTS because Télécoms sector has only 2 stocks; consider padding related list from broader universe so the Valeurs à découvrir grid isn't sparse for small sectors.
Home.js sector-tile testids use French labels with spaces/accents (e.g. sector-tile-Services Publics) which works but is fragile; consider stable slugs.
TopNav search input has no client-side filtering wired up — currently a stub.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All v2 UI acceptance criteria pass. Heatmap renders 26 cells across 7 sectors on desktop and switches to stacked sector rows on <640px. StockDetail /stock/SNTS fully functional; amount input enables mint Vérifier l'ordre button. If further changes are made to Home layout or Treemap, re-run the same Playwright flow at both 1440x900 and 430x900.
